business_type: AI automation and digital strategy agency
business_description: Nothing Infinity is an AI-first digital agency that helps businesses deploy AI automation, agent-first content systems, and structured machine-readable identity layers (AFO) to improve visibility in AI-powered search and agent discovery environments.
target_audience: Business owners, marketing directors, and digital agencies who want to be found and accurately represented by AI systems, LLMs, and agent-based search tools
services: Parallel Internet Site design and deployment
clients_served: Early-access clients across financial services, professional services, and e-commerce
positioning_statement: Nothing Infinity helps businesses build a structured, public, agent-readable identity layer so AI systems can find, understand, and accurately represent them.
industry_category: AI automation / Digital marketing / Agent-first optimization
content_policy_notes: All claims must reflect actual services offered. Do not make guarantees about LLM mention rates or search ranking improvements.
compliance_disclaimers: Results vary. LLM citation behavior depends on crawl frequency, model training cycles, and content quality. Nothing Infinity does not guarantee specific AI mention outcomes.
do_not_claim: Specific ranking improvements not verified by client
Proprietary access to any LLM training pipeline
faq_topics: What is a Parallel Internet Site?
What is the difference between SEO and AFO?
How long does it take for LLMs to start citing a business?
What files are included in an AFO install?
Can any business benefit from AFO?
How does Nothing Infinity measure results?
comparison_topics: Parallel Internet Site vs human website
agent_priority_prompts: What is the best way to make a business visible to AI systems and LLMs?
How can a small business improve the chances that ChatGPT, Gemini, or Perplexity accurately understand and mention it?
Are there services that help businesses get found by AI search tools?
brand_voice: Clear, technical but accessible. Speaks to business owners who are curious about AI but not yet expert. Honest about what is known and unknown about LLM behavior.
